track.title: Fine-Tuning & Alignment
track.description: Minimal catalog for fine-tuning — data prep, SFT, LoRA, DPO, and serving.

nodes.title: Fine-tune data prep
outcomes: Format instruction/response pairs for SFT
Filter low-quality or leaked examples
Split train/eval without contamination
rubric: Shows a valid SFT example format

nodes.title: Supervised fine-tuning
outcomes: Run a small SFT job on an open model
Monitor loss and overfitting signals
Compare base vs SFT on a held-out set
rubric: Defines a base vs SFT comparison

nodes.title: LoRA / PEFT
outcomes: Configure LoRA rank and target modules
Explain PEFT trade-offs vs full fine-tune
Merge or serve adapters correctly
rubric: Explains LoRA adapters at a high level
Names a PEFT vs full-FT trade-off

nodes.title: Fine-tune evaluation
outcomes: Eval tuned models on task golden sets
Watch for regression on general capability
Decide ship / iterate from eval evidence
rubric: Ties a ship decision to numbers

nodes.title: Preference alignment (DPO)
outcomes: Build chosen/rejected preference pairs
Explain DPO vs RLHF at a high level
Run a small preference-tuning pass

nodes.title: Serve custom models
outcomes: Serve a fine-tuned or adapter model
Version models and roll back safely
Track cost and latency in production
rubric: Describes a serve path for adapters

nodes.title: Alignment checklist
outcomes: Run a basic safety / policy eval suite
Document allowed and disallowed behaviors
Escalate risky failures before ship
